case_title: CALIFORNIA CASUALTY INDEMNITY EXCHANGE VS. VICTOR MATTHEW NAPOLEON ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-10-2016 CONTINUED TO APR-13-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
